title: io.sparkedsense.inference.classification
description: Discrete-class ML inference output. Emitted by edge classifiers (audio/image/vibration).

class_vocabulary.description: Ordered list of possible classes; enables downstream consumers to reconstruct the full probability distribution if scores are provided.

scores.description: Optional per-class scores aligned with class_vocabulary.

model_version.description: Semver or hash of the deployed model weights.

inference_ms.description: Wall-clock inference latency on the edge node.

source_event_id.description: Optional: if this inference was derived from another event (e.g., raw audio window), the original event id.
